steps.title: Recognize the 'likely' + verb structure
steps.content: ”Respondents were more likely ______ common Brazilian foods.” The blank comes after the adjective 'likely' and needs a verb form that expresses what the respondents were likely to do.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive rule
steps.content: Verbs following 'likely' must be in infinitive form (to + base verb). Choice B, “to eat,” provides this required form. The other choices use non-infinitive verb forms (simple past, progressive phrase without 'to,' and past participle). This matches choice B — B is correct.
